EXPERT.speaker: EXPERT
EXPERT.why: Frame shows a middle-aged Indian man in a suit speaking authoritatively in an interview/podcast setting. His lines are measured, analytical English with Indian phrasing ('If you have asked'). Ankit is a middle-aged Indian male voice with a natural, conversational, engaging tone — ideal for a credible 25-yr expert delivering market analysis in Indian-accented English.
EXPERT.name: Ankit - Conversational Hindi Narration

HOST.speaker: HOST
HOST.why: Frame shows a young Indian man hosting a podcast, asking curious, relatable questions ('should I buy gold right now?'). Agastya (Social Media & Travel Vlogger) is a young Indian male voice with spontaneous, engaging energy that fits a young interviewer/host, and is distinct from the expert's voice.
HOST.name: Agastya - Social Media & Travel Vlogger

VO.speaker: VO
VO.why: VO narrates the data-driven ad copy over charts and gold bars with a CTA to follow. Aakash Aryan is a charismatic, polished Indian male advertisement voice — perfect for confident commercial narration, and distinct from both the expert and host voices.
VO.name: Aakash Aryan - Charismatic Mass Ads
